cases.input: Review this GitHub Actions workflow that deploys to AWS S3; it uses pull_request_target, permissions write-all, and hardcoded AWS keys in env. Harden it before we enable branch protection.
We deploy a stateless checkout service plus a DB migration adding a non-null column. Pick a rollback strategy before we ship Thursday.
We're deploying a payments change to production tomorrow that touches the checkout path. Walk us through the go-live checklist.
Set up pre-commit, commit-msg and pre-push hooks for our JS repo with Conventional Commits enforcement, but don't write any files yet.
Add dependency caching to our setup-node CI step keyed on the lockfile.
Enforce a Lighthouse performance budget in our pipeline so PRs fail when web vitals regress.
Help me with our release process — I think we need both CI changes and a rollback plan.
Cut over our DNS to the new load balancer and rotate the production database secrets as part of the deploy.
We keep leaking staging env vars into prod. Set up dev/staging/prod separation with name-matched env variables and CLI aliases.
Plan a safe upgrade of our transitive dependencies and surface any audit advisories without breaking the lockfile.
